era: 1992-present. Post-Grunge. E=5 -- reflective, understated, soul-inflected. Capitol Hill. Epic Records.

theory_nodes.concept: Shawn Smith soul tradition: Al Green and Marvin Gaye filtered through Capitol Hill alt-rock. The voice-centered project in a guitar-centered scene.
theory_nodes.description: Soul in Seattle: the underrepresented tradition.

theory_nodes.concept: Stone Gossard dual membership: Pearl Jam arena rock and Brad's intimate post-grunge simultaneously. The artistic double life.
theory_nodes.description: Pearl Jam and Brad: same guitarist, two worlds.

theory_nodes.concept: Long-form career at E=5: artistic sustainability without commercial pressure. Active since 1992. Records made on own timeline.

cross_references.relationship: E=6 to E=5. Capitol Hill. Melodic grunge to soul post-grunge.
E=5 to E=7. Post-Grunge to Grunge. Capitol Hill to Seattle. Four-degree arc closes.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=9. FIRST CANIDAE IN ENGINE. Multi-voice rising harmonic howl. Washington wolf recovery. E=5 + E=9 = E=14. Maximum asymmetry.
